creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Dude, I'm starving. Let's go to Five Guys. Yeah, let me get the hamburger lettuce wrapped with all the veggies on it and a Coke Zero. Man, I never would have thought to order like that. Dude, you're not following Seth G. yet? I'm gonna follow Seth G. right now.
caption:
You're not FAT because you eat fast food, it's because how you order

Next time you go to Five Guys order this:

Hamburger lettuce wrapped with all the veggies, mustard and a Coke Zero
(470 calories 33 G protein)

This will save you over 1000 cal and keep you on track with your fitness journey

Save this for later

Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps

Eating out tips
Restaurant swaps
Men's health and fitness

#macrofriendly #fitover40
ocr_summary: Five Guys: 3240 cal / 86g protein (original) vs 470 cal / 33g protein (swap).

swaps.original_meal: Standard Five Guys meal (burger + fries + soda)
swaps.swap_meal: Hamburger lettuce wrapped with all veggies, mustard + Coke Zero

parsed.notes: Single Five Guys swap. Massive calorie difference (2770 cal saved) by removing bun (lettuce wrap), skipping fries entirely, using mustard instead of mayo/ketchup, and diet drink. Protein drops significantly (86 to 33) because the original includes a large fries which has some protein.
